etn 3.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Explore acoustic telemetry data
    • Configure credentials
    • Options
  • Changelog

List all available station names

Source: R/list_station_names.R
list_station_names.Rd

List all available station names

Usage

list_station_names(connection)

Arguments

connection

A connection to the ETN database. This argument is no longer used. You will be prompted for credentials instead.

Value

A vector of all unique station_name present in acoustic.deployments.

See also

Other list functions: list_acoustic_project_codes(), list_acoustic_tag_ids(), list_animal_ids(), list_animal_project_codes(), list_cpod_project_codes(), list_deployment_ids(), list_receiver_ids(), list_scientific_names(), list_tag_serial_numbers(), list_values()

Examples

list_station_names()
#>    [1] ""                                                            
#>    [2] "?"                                                           
#>    [3] "~30-50 m u/s fishway, right bank"                            
#>    [4] "0"                                                           
#>    [5] "000_R"                                                       
#>    [6] "0.7 predation"                                               
#>    [7] "1"                                                           
#>    [8] "01 MG pasteleiro                                            "
#>    [9] "1 Tawnyard"                                                  
#>   [10] "1_2024"                                                      
#>   [11] "1_Aval_BD"                                                   
#>   [12] "1.3 Confluence"                                              
#>   [13] "1.5 Broken Br."                                              
#>   [14] "1.7 Otter Pool"
